title: Aldershot and Farnborough - Alex Baker MP | Aldershot
meta_description: Click on the links below for information about my campaigns to make the UK a more prosperous, fairer, greener and safer place for all.
text_excerpt: Aldershot and Farnborough - Alex Baker MP | Aldershot >>>>>>>>> (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) >>>>>>>>> End (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) Find me on Facebook 020 7219 4085 Email Me HOME ABOUT NEWS CAMPAIGNS Aldershot and Farnborough Labour’s Missions COMMUNITY SURVEY HELP Contact Useful Links Visit Parliament Privacy Policy Aldershot and Farnborough Standing up for you and for our area. REBUILDING FRIMLEY PARK HOSPITAL Improving health Improving hospitals, healthcare and health in our community. Details NEW SPORTS CENTRE FOR FARNBOROUGH Sports and play It’s time for new facilities in our community Details HOMES FIT FOR HEROES Better housing for our Forces Action to support our servicemen, women and their families Details REVITALISING OUR TOWN CENTRES Regeneration & anti-social behaviour Investing in the future of Aldershot and Farnborough Details GET IN TOUCH I would love to hear from you about what you think my priorities should be as your MP and what matters most to you. I can also help you with issues such as benefits, housing, immigration, tax, the NHS and education. I aim to respond promptly to everyone, but please remember that I have to prioritise constituents with the most urgent or pressing issues. Campaign or policy issues may take a bit longer. There is also a list of other agencies that may help you here . Please use the contact form to get in touch with me. Please remember to provide as many details as possible, including your name, address and full details of your issue. Don’t forget your postcode! 020 7219 4085 alex.baker.mp@parliament.uk Contact (Footer) Contact Full Name Email Phone/Mobile Address Message I have read & agree to the Privacy Policy (Required) I have read and agree to the policy on Abusive or Unacceptable Behaviour Policy (Required) Sign up to campaign updates Sign me up for email updates with news & campaign developments. Submit Social Media Facebook X-twitter Instagram Get Involved Please use the contact form here to get in touch with me and find out more about my campaigns, priorities and how to get involved. Please remember to provide as much details as possible, including your full contact details.
